card_analysis.core_mechanic: Tap to create X 1/1 red Goblin creature tokens, where X is the number of Goblins you control
activated_abilities: {T}: Create X 1/1 red Goblin creature tokens, where X is the number of Goblins you control

emerging_strategies: Goblin storm with Skirk Prospector loops

strategic_profile.game_plan_summary: Flood the board with cheap goblins to exponentially scale Krenko's tap ability. The deck inverts quantity vs quality — many cheap goblins outperform fewer expensive threats because Krenko doubles the count each activation. A 1-mana 1/1 goblin is more valuable than a 4-mana 4/4 non-goblin.

win_conditions.description: Overwhelm opponents with exponentially growing goblin tokens
Combo kill via Skirk Prospector + Goblin Recruiter loops

build_paths.name: Goblin Swarm
build_paths.description: Maximize goblin count for explosive Krenko activations

anti_synergies.description: Board wipes you control hurt you more than opponents since you have the widest board
anti_synergies.reasoning: Your board is wider than opponents; sweepers destroy your exponential advantage

strategic_constraints.mana_base_requirements: Mono-red, low curve, wants 4 mana by turn 3-4

power_indicators.notes: Explosive when uncontested; fragile to repeated board wipes and commander removal

value_inversions.normal_heuristic: Creatures are evaluated by individual card quality — bigger stats, better abilities, and standalone impact are preferred
value_inversions.inverted_value: Krenko doubles goblin count, so each additional goblin body multiplies exponentially. Quantity of goblins matters more than individual card quality
value_inversions.evaluation_guidance: Prefer cheap goblin bodies over individually powerful creatures. A 1-mana 1/1 goblin feeds Krenko's doubling better than a 5-mana 5/5 non-goblin.

mispriced_card_examples.why_undervalued: 1/1 for 1 looks terrible but is a combo enabler and mana accelerant with Krenko's tokens
A 1/1 that makes a 1/1 is two goblin bodies for Krenko to double — outperforms 'better' creatures
Generates 3 total goblin bodies across zones for 2 mana, exponential fuel for Krenko
